Grandes
projetos
nascem na
estrat=C3=A9gia

Estrat=C3=A9gia, marketing, comunica=C3=A7=C3=A3o e = eventos para marcas que exigem mais do que presen=C3=A7a =E2=80=94 exigem d= ire=C3=A7=C3=A3o, consist=C3=AAncia e resultado real.

Vamos falar do seu projeto Conhe=C3=A7a a Rastro
Mercedes-Benz LotoGreen Mangalarga Marchador Exposibram Expo Cacha=C3=A7a Brahma Fiat MRV Unimed Mercedes-Benz LotoGreen Mangalarga Marchador Exposibram Expo Cacha=C3=A7a Brahma Fiat MRV Unimed

Quem somos

Est= rat=C3=A9gia
que move
neg=C3=B3cios

A RASTRO =C3=A9 uma empresa de estrat=C3=A9gia, marketing, comunica=C3=A7= =C3=A3o e eventos criada para atender marcas que exigem mais do que presen= =C3=A7a: exigem dire=C3=A7=C3=A3o, consist=C3=AAncia e resultado.

Atuamos a partir de uma l=C3=B3gica clara: toda a=C3=A7=C3=A3o precisa nas= cer de um objetivo estrat=C3=A9gico e se sustentar em execu=C3=A7=C3=A3o pr= ecisa. Cada projeto =C3=A9 estruturado com m=C3=A9todo e gest=C3=A3o comple= ta.

N=C3=A3o trabalham= os com solu=C3=A7=C3=B5es gen=C3=A9ricas. Entendemos a cultura, o momento e= os desafios de cada empresa para desenhar projetos vi=C3=A1veis, aplic=C3= =A1veis e alinhados =C3=A0 realidade do neg=C3=B3cio.

"Mais do que executar, acompanhamos= , mensuramos e ajustamos."

Porque resultado n= =C3=A3o acontece por acaso. =C3=89 constru=C3=ADdo com estrat=C3=A9gia, ges= t=C3=A3o e responsabilidade. Na RASTRO, marketing fortalece posicionamento.= Eventos criam presen=C3=A7a e conex=C3=A3o real com o p=C3=BAblico.

Marcas atendidas
4
Frentes de atua=C3=A7=C3=A3o
100%
Foco em resultado
BH

Nossas solu=C3=A7=C3=B5es

O que
a Rastro
e= ntrega

Solicitar proposta
01

Eventos

Planejamento, gest=C3=A3o e execu=C3=A7=C3=A3o d= e eventos conduzidos a partir de objetivos estrat=C3=A9gicos claros. Cada p= rojeto =C3=A9 desenhado para gerar experi=C3=AAncia, fortalecer posicioname= nto e entregar resultados mensur=C3=A1veis.

  • Planejamento, coordena=C3=A7=C3=A3o e produ=C3=A7=C3=A3o de eve= ntos
  • Produ=C3=A7=C3=A3o de eventos esportivos e iGaming
  • Experi=C3=AAncias interativas e ativa=C3=A7=C3=A3o de marca
  • Cerimonial, recep=C3=A7=C3=A3o e protocolos
  • Feiras, simp=C3=B3sios e congressos
  • Gest=C3=A3o de presen=C3=A7as VIP e influenciadores
  • Festas corporativas e celebra=C3=A7=C3=B5es institucionais
02

Marketing &
Comunica=C3=A7=C3=A3o

Estrat=C3=A9gias de comunica=C3=A7=C3=A3o integr= ada, branding e marketing corporativo com foco em posicionamento, reputa=C3= =A7=C3=A3o e performance =E2=80=94 gerando valor real e consistente para as= marcas.

  • Planejamento de marketing para eventos
  • Campanhas estrat=C3=A9gicas de marketing
  • Gest=C3=A3o de parcerias com influenciadores
  • Posicionamento digital para marcas
  • Cria=C3=A7=C3=A3o e reposicionamento de marcas
  • Gest=C3=A3o de crises de imagem e reputa=C3=A7=C3=A3o
  • Propostas comerciais para patroc=C3=ADnios
03

A=C3=A7=C3=B5es
Promocionais

Cria=C3=A7=C3=A3o e execu=C3=A7=C3=A3o de a=C3= =A7=C3=B5es promocionais orientadas por objetivos estrat=C3=A9gicos, com fo= co em engajamento qualificado e impacto direto na percep=C3=A7=C3=A3o e nos= resultados da marca.

  • Panfletagem e divulga=C3=A7=C3=A3o em campo
  • Ativa=C3=A7=C3=B5es de marca
  • Estrat=C3=A9gias de engajamento interno e externo
04

Cobertura
Audiovisual

Produ=C3=A7=C3=A3o de conte=C3=BAdo audiovisual = estrat=C3=A9gico, transformando eventos e marcas em ativos de comunica=C3= =A7=C3=A3o que ampliam presen=C3=A7a digital, relev=C3=A2ncia e resultados.=

  • Storymaker e conte=C3=BAdo em tempo real
  • Fotografia profissional para eventos
  • Filmagem e cobertura em v=C3=ADdeo
  • V=C3=ADdeos institucionais e promocionais

Por que a Rastro

Nosso
diferencial

01

Imers=C3=A3o na cultura

= Entendemos o contexto e os objetivos de cada cliente antes de agir. Nunca p= ulamos o diagn=C3=B3stico.

Toda entrega =C3=A9 alinhada =C3=A0s metas reais do neg=C3=B3cio. N= =C3=A3o existem a=C3=A7=C3=B5es soltas ou sem prop=C3=B3sito.

03

Criatividade realista

Id= eias precisam ser vi=C3=A1veis, aplic=C3=A1veis e gerar impacto mensur=C3= =A1vel. Criatividade com responsabilidade.

04

Aco= mpanhamos do diagn=C3=B3stico =C3=A0 entrega final, com foco em resultado m= ensur=C3=A1vel a cada etapa.

text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: cid:css-431038ae-42ed-400b-9e74-1ded3e121289@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; :root { --lar: #C85A2A; --lar2: #E06B35; --creme: #EDE8DF; --cdim: rgba(237= ,232,223,0.58); --preto: #0A0A0A; --e1: #111; --e2: #181818; --e3: #222; --= bdim: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); --FT: 'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; --FC: 'Montser= rat',sans-serif; --ease: cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } *, ::before, ::after { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { background: var(--preto); color: var(--creme); font-family: var(--FC= ); overflow-x: hidden; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } img { display: block; max-width: 100%; } a { text-decoration: none; } .lbl { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-size: 10p= x; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--lar); fo= nt-weight: 600; } .lbl::before { content: ""; width: 24px; height: 1px; background: var(--lar= ); } .ttl { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: clamp(50px, 7.5vw, 106px); line-h= eight: 0.93; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: var(--creme); } .ttl em { color: var(--lar); font-style: normal; } .bod { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--cdim); font-weight:= 300; } .bod strong { color: var(--creme); font-weight: 600; } .sr { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(44px); transition: opacity 0.85s va= r(--ease),transform 0.85s var(--ease); } .sr.l { transform: translateX(-40px); } .sr.r { transform: translateX(40px); } .sr.on { opacity: 1; transform: none; } .btn-f { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; te= xt-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); backg= round: var(--lar); padding: 16px 40px; transition: background 0.3s, transfo= rm 0.3s; } .btn-f:hover { background: rgb(168, 70, 32); transform: translateY(-3px); } .btn-l { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; te= xt-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);= border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22); padding-bottom: 3px; t= ransition: color 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; } .btn-l:hover { color: var(--creme); border-color: var(--creme); } .btn-gh { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; t= ext-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; color: var(--creme); border: 1p= x solid rgba(200, 90, 42, 0.55); padding: 13px 28px; transition: background= 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .btn-gh:hover { background: var(--lar); border-color: var(--lar); } .btn-w { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; te= xt-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; color: var(--lar); background: r= gb(255, 255, 255); padding: 16px 40px; transition: background 0.3s, transfo= rm 0.3s; } .btn-w:hover { background: var(--creme); transform: translateY(-3px); } .btn-ow { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; t= ext-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); bord= er: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45); padding: 16px 36px; transition: ba= ckground 0.3s; } .btn-ow:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); } #hdr { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 900; padd= ing: 18px 60px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-= between; background: transparent; transition: background 0.5s, padding 0.4s= , border-color 0.5s; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; } #hdr.solid { background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(16px= ); border-color: var(--bdim); padding: 12px 60px; } .hdr-logo { height: 28px; width: auto; transition: height 0.4s; mix-blend-m= ode: screen; } #hdr.solid .hdr-logo { height: 22px; mix-blend-mode: screen; } .hnav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 40px; } .hnav a { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercas= e; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2= 5s; position: relative; } .hnav a::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -3px; left: 0px; = right: 100%; height: 1px; background: var(--lar); transition: right .3s var= (--ease); } .hnav a:hover { color: var(--creme); } .hnav a:hover::after { right: 0px; } .burg { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; b= ackground: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: cu= rrentcolor; border-image: initial; padding: 6px; } .burg span { display: block; width: 26px; height: 1.5px; background: var(--= creme); transition: 0.35s; } .burg.op span:nth-child(1) { transform: translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg); } .burg.op span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; } .burg.op span:nth-child(3) { transform: translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg); = } #mob { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 899; background= : var(--preto); flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-conten= t: center; gap: 28px; } #mob.op { display: flex; } #mob a { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 52px; color: var(--creme); lett= er-spacing: 0.04em; transition: color 0.2s; } #mob a:hover { color: var(--lar); } .hero { position: relative; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-directio= n: column; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 80px 60px 88px; overflow: hi= dden; } .h-slides { position: absolute; inset: 0px; } .h-slide { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-size: cover; backgrou= nd-position: center center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 1.6s; } .h-slide.on { opacity: 1; } .h-ov { position: absolute; inset: 0px; z-index: 1; background: radial-grad= ient(70% 55% at 50% 0%, rgba(200, 90, 42, 0.07) 0%, transparent 60%), radia= l-gradient(90% 45% at 100% 100%, rgba(160, 50, 5, 0.18) 0%, transparent 55%= ), linear-gradient(rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.45) 0%, rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.08) 25%, r= gba(10, 10, 10, 0.65) 68%, rgb(10, 10, 10) 100%); } .h-grain { position: absolute; inset: 0px; z-index: 2; pointer-events: none= ; opacity: 0.042; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox= =3D'0 0 200 200' xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id=3D'n'%= 3E%3CfeTurbulence type=3D'fractalNoise' baseFrequency=3D'0.85' numOctaves= =3D'4' stitchTiles=3D'stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width=3D'100%25' heig= ht=3D'100%25' filter=3D'url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); background-size: 180px;= } .h-glow { position: absolute; bottom: -80px; left: -80px; width: 560px; hei= ght: 380px; z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; background: radial-gradient(r= gba(200, 90, 42, 0.2) 0%, transparent 70%); filter: blur(38px); } .h-con { position: relative; z-index: 3; max-width: 1000px; } .hero h1 { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: clamp(56px, 8vw, 118px); line= -height: 0.92; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: var(--creme); margin-bottom: = 28px; opacity: 0; animation: aFU 1.1s .3s var(--ease) forwards; } .hero h1 em { color: var(--lar); font-style: normal; } .h-sub { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.75; max-width: 500px; color: rgba(= 255, 255, 255, 0.55); font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 44px; opacity: 0; an= imation: aFU 1s .55s var(--ease) forwards; } .h-btns { display: flex; gap: 18px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; o= pacity: 0; animation: aFU 1s .75s var(--ease) forwards; } .h-dots { position: absolute; bottom: 40px; right: 60px; z-index: 3; displa= y: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .h-dot { width: 1px; height: 28px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); tr= ansition: background 0.3s, height 0.3s; cursor: pointer; } .h-dot.on { background: var(--lar); height: 50px; } .mqr { background: var(--e2); border-top: 1px solid var(--bdim); border-bot= tom: 1px solid var(--bdim); padding: 22px 0px; overflow: hidden; position: = relative; } .mqr::before, .mqr::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; bott= om: 0px; width: 100px; z-index: 2; } .mqr::before { left: 0px; background: linear-gradient(to right,var(--e2),tr= ansparent); } .mqr::after { right: 0px; background: linear-gradient(to left,var(--e2),tra= nsparent); } .mqr-t { display: flex; gap: 52px; align-items: center; animation: 28s line= ar 0s infinite normal none running marquee; white-space: nowrap; will-chang= e: transform; } .mqr-t:hover { animation-play-state: paused; } @keyframes marquee {=20 100% { transform: translateX(-50%); } } .mn { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.26em; text-transform: uppercase; c= olor: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28); font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; transiti= on: color 0.3s; } .mn:hover { color: var(--lar); } .ms { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--lar); = opacity: 0.4; flex-shrink: 0; } .sobre { background: var(--e1); padding: relative; z-index: 1; } .s-pull { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 46px); line= -height: 1.12; color: var(--lar); border-left: 3px solid var(--lar); paddin= g-left: 28px; margin-bottom: 36px; } .s-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2px; margin-= top: 52px; } .sst { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border: 1px solid var(--bdim)= ; padding: 32px 26px; transition: border-color 0.35s, background 0.35s; } .sst:hover { border-color: rgba(200, 90, 42, 0.4); background: rgba(200, 90= , 42, 0.05); } .sst-n { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 58px; line-height: 1; color: va= r(--lar); margin-bottom: 8px; } .sst-l { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase= ; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); } .pmv { background: var(--e2); border-top: 1px solid var(--bdim); padding: 8= 0px 60px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr; gap: 6= 0px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .pmv::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; righ= t: 0px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(-= -lar),transparent); opacity: 0.3; } .pmv-d { background: var(--bdim); } .pmv-tag { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: upperca= se; color: var(--lar); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 18px; } .pmv-h { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 36px; color: var(--creme); marg= in-bottom: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .pmv-p { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--cdim); font-weight= : 300; } .serv { background: var(--preto); padding: 130px 60px; position: relative; = overflow: hidden; } .serv::before { content: "SERVI=C3=87OS"; position: absolute; font-family: = var(--FT); font-size: 18vw; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: -0.03em; c= olor: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.016); top: 10%; left: 50%; transform: translate= X(-50%); pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .serv-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: fle= x-end; margin-bottom: 72px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 28px; position: relative;= z-index: 1; } .serv-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 2px= ; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .sc { background: var(--e2); padding: 56px 48px; border: 1px solid var(--bd= im); position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: default; transition: bac= kground 0.45s; } .sc-photo { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-size: cover; backgro= und-position: center center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.6s; } .sc:hover .sc-photo { opacity: 0.09; } .sc::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; bottom:= 0px; width: 3px; background: var(--lar); transform: scaleY(0); transform-o= rigin: center bottom; transition: transform .5s var(--ease); z-index: 2; } .sc:hover { background: rgba(180, 70, 20, 0.07); } .sc:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .sc-bg { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 20px; font-family: var(--FT)= ; font-size: 100px; line-height: 1; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); point= er-events: none; transition: color 0.45s; z-index: 1; } .sc:hover .sc-bg { color: rgba(200, 90, 42, 0.08); } .sc-name { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 38px; letter-spacing: 0.02em;= color: var(--creme); margin-bottom: 18px; line-height: 1.05; position: rel= ative; z-index: 2; } .sc-desc { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--cdim); font-weig= ht: 300; margin-bottom: 28px; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .sc-link { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercas= e; font-weight: 600; color: var(--lar); display: inline-flex; align-items: = center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer; border-width: medium; border-style: non= e; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; background: none; fon= t-family: var(--FC); transition: gap 0.3s; position: relative; z-index: 2; = } .sc-link::after { content: "=E2=86=92"; } .sc:hover .sc-link { gap: 16px; } .sub { list-style: none; margin-top: 14px; display: none; position: relativ= e; z-index: 2; } .sub.op { display: block; } .sub li { font-size: 12px; color: var(--cdim); padding: 7px 0px; border-bot= tom: 1px solid var(--bdim); display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px= ; } .sub li::before { content: "=E2=80=94"; color: var(--lar); flex-shrink: 0; = } .dif { background: var(--lar); padding: 130px background-size: cover; backgro= und-position: center center; opacity: 0.06; mix-blend-mode: multiply; } .dif::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: rep= eating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) = 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 80px); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; = } .dif .lbl { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65); z-index: 2; position: relativ= e; } .dif .lbl::before { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65); } .dif .ttl { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); margin-top: 16px; position: relative= ; z-index: 2; } .dif-g { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); border-left:= 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18); margin-top: 68px; position: relative;= z-index: 2; } .di { padding: 44px 32px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18)= ; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18); transition: background 0= .35s; } .di:hover { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14); } .di-n { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 62px; line-height: 1; color: rgb= a(255, 255, 255, 0.15); margin-bottom: 28px; } .di-t { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 28px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255);= letter-spacing: 0.03em; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.1; } .di-d { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82)= ; font-weight: 300; } .port { background: var(--e1); padding: 100px 60px; } .port-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: fle= x-end; margin-bottom: 52px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; } .mural { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); grid-templa= te-rows: 340px 240px; gap: 3px; } .mi-1 { grid-area: 1 / 1 / auto / 7; } .mi-2 { grid-area: 1 / 7 / auto / 10; } .mi-3 { grid-area: 1 / 10 / auto / 13; } .mi-4 { grid-area: 2 / 1 / auto / 5; } .mi-5 { grid-area: 2 / 5 / auto / 9; } .mi-6 { grid-area: 2 / 9 / auto / 13; } .mi { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: var(--e3); cursor: = pointer; } .mi img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transfo= rm .8s var(--ease),filter .5s; filter: saturate(0.75) brightness(0.85); } .mi:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); filter: saturate(1) brightness(0.72= ); } .mi-warm { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: linear-gradient(135d= eg, rgba(200, 90, 42, 0.1) 0%, transparent 55%); z-index: 1; pointer-events= : none; } .mi-ov { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: radial-gradient(transp= arent 30%, rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.65) 100%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.= 45s; z-index: 2; } .mi:hover .mi-ov { opacity: 1; } .val { background: var(--preto); padding: 130px 60px; position: relative; o= verflow: hidden; } .val::before { content: "ESTRAT=C3=89GIA"; position: absolute; font-family:= var(--FT); font-size: 22vw; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: -0.03em; = color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate= (-50%, -50%); pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .val::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -100px; right: -100p= x; width: 500px; height: 500px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(20= 0, 90, 42, 0.08) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; } .vg { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 2px; margi= n-top: 64px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .vc { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.024); border: 1px solid var(--bdim)= ; padding: 44px 28px; transition: background .35s,border-color .35s,transfo= rm .45s var(--ease); } .vc:hover { background: rgba(200, 90, 42, 0.09); border-color: rgba(200, 90= , 42, 0.45); transform: translateY(-8px); } .vc-n { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 48px; color: rgba(200, 90, 42, 0= .22); margin-bottom: 20px; line-height: 1; } .vc-name { font-family: var(--FT); font-size: 30px; color: var(--lar); marg= in-bottom: 14px; } .vc-d { font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--cdim); } .cli { background: var(--e2); padding: 90px 60px; border-top: 1px solid var= (--bdim); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bdim); } .cli-logos { margin-top: 52px; background: transparent; padding: 48px 0px; = } .cli-logos img { width: 100%; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0px auto; display:= block; mix-blend-mode: screen; } .cband { position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-height: 480px; display: = flex; align-items: center; } .cband-bg {
